import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    Err("no input")
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    Err("invalid integer")
  end
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 1
  while i <= n
    sum = sum + i
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
